case.interpretation: first standard padded case M=4, m=3 (determinant size 4, permanent size 3)
case.target_form: z*per_3 with six unused ambient variables

claim_discipline: No VP versus VNP consequence is claimed.
The r=2 exact ranks are certified over Q as described in the referenced certificates.
The r=3 determinant value is a rigorous lower bound over Q obtained from rank over F_1009; it is not claimed to be the exact rational rank.

representation_bottleneck.consequence: ordinary Schur projection of Phi_2 has only one nonzero isotypic component

compound_r3.representation_intersection: S_(8,2,2)V (multiplicity one in the exact plethysm/Pieri calculation)

main_verdict.scope: r=2 catalecticants through order 2; all four two-slot LR/Young flattening types of the S_(6,2) tensor; exact degree 4,5,6 pieces of the r=2 Hessian-minor ideal; degree-6 r=3 Hessian-minor span.
main_verdict.statement: The compound Hessian survives padding, but every certified rank obstruction tested has rank(z*per_3) < rank(det_4), hence none excludes z*per_3 from the determinant orbit closure.
